merge.connectToCloud: Connect System you want to merge with this one to {{cloudName}} or merge locally using {{vmsName}} Client.
merge.mergeConfirmation: You are about to merge systems {{primarySystem}} and {{secondarySystem}}. Settings and the name will be taken from the {{primarySystem}}.
merge.primaryCannotMerge: System {{targetSystem}} has a newer software version that is incompatible with the current system. Update the current system to the latest build to merge it with the {{targetSystem}} System.
merge.primarySystemOffline: System {{primarySystem}} is offline and cannot be merged with System {{targetSystem}}.
merge.secondaryCannotMerge: System {{targetSystem}} has an older software version that is incompatible with the current system. Update {{targetSystem}} to the latest build to merge it with the current one.
merge.systemOffline: System {{targetSystem}} is offline and cannot be merged with the current one.
merge.systemUnavailable: System {{targetSystem}} is currently unreachable. Try again in a few minutes or contact
